title: vicia vicina var. luteiflora
intro: Vicia vicina var. luteiflora, also known as yellow-flowered bird's-foot trefoil, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Vicia vicina var. luteiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
